channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: Opinion: Opinion | Why Are Some Of India's Sharpest Pakistan Critics Calling For 'Talks'?
item.description: In the past, almost every such initiative has been met with a return to a terror attack.
item.content:encoded: In the past, almost every such initiative has been met with a return to a terror attack.

item.title: The Curious Case Of An Award-Winning Story That Is Likely AI-Written

media:content.media:description: The irony that AI is used to detect AI-writing is not lost on anyone

item.description: A short story that won one of the English-speaking world's most recognised literary prizes is now at the centre of an uncomfortable AI debate.
item.content:encoded: A short story that won one of the English-speaking world's most recognised literary prizes is now at the centre of an uncomfortable AI debate.

item.title: 3 Dead, 17 Missing As Unfinished Hotel Collapses in Philippines

media:content.media:description: Twenty-six workers were either rescued or managed to run out of the collapsing building

item.description: A day after the unfinished building collapse with a loud crashing sound after a fierce thunderstorm, Angeles City Mayor Carmelo Lazatin said rescue efforts would still not be shifted to a body retrieval operation.
item.content:encoded: A day after the unfinished building collapse with a loud crashing sound after a fierce thunderstorm, Angeles City Mayor Carmelo Lazatin said rescue efforts would still not be shifted to a body retrieval operation.

item.title: Singha Beer Heir Sexual Abuse Allegations Ignite Rare Public Reckoning In Thailand

media:content.media:description: Siranudh has publicly distanced himself from his family's Boonrawd business empire

item.description: One of Thailand's biggest beer brands, Singha is recognised internationally for its golden lion logo and partnerships with sports giants Chelsea FC and the Haas Formula One team.
item.content:encoded: One of Thailand's biggest beer brands, Singha is recognised internationally for its golden lion logo and partnerships with sports giants Chelsea FC and the Haas Formula One team.

item.title: Pilgrims Kick Off Hajj As War's Trajectory Hangs In Balance

media:content.media:description: The white-robed pilgrims on buses or on foot arrived at the sprawling encampment in Mina

item.description: The start of the hajj came as US President Donald Trump continued to send mixed signals over a possible agreement to extend an uneasy ceasefire with Iran and a deal to reopen the Strait of Hormuz.
item.content:encoded: The start of the hajj came as US President Donald Trump continued to send mixed signals over a possible agreement to extend an uneasy ceasefire with Iran and a deal to reopen the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Indian Sailors Risk Work At Sea As Iran War Grinds On: 'It's Well Paid Job'

media:content.media:description: Desh Garima, an Indian-flagged tanker carrying crude oil that transited through the Strait of Hormuz

item.description: India is one of the largest contributors of sailors on merchant shipping worldwide, with more than 320,000 active seafarers in 2025, according to the shipping ministry.
item.content:encoded: India is one of the largest contributors of sailors on merchant shipping worldwide, with more than 320,000 active seafarers in 2025, according to the shipping ministry.

item.title: Mojtaba Khamenei In Hiding, Using Courier Network To Communicate: Report

media:content.media:description: The White House has declined to comment on intelligence related to the supreme leader's whereabouts

item.description: Khamenei, who was injured in US and Israeli strikes in Operation Epic Fury, has not been officially seen or heard in public since before the start of the war. Media reports claim he is taking extreme measures to avoid the strikes similar to the ones
item.content:encoded: Khamenei, who was injured in US and Israeli strikes in Operation Epic Fury, has not been officially seen or heard in public since before the start of the war. Media reports claim he is taking extreme measures to avoid the strikes similar to the ones

item.title: Promised To Return For Dinner, Never Did: Indian Man Dies In New Zealand

media:content.media:description: Dhillon started driving for Uber to get some flexibility to care for daughter

item.description: Concern grew when he stopped answering calls before police arrived at the family's home later that night to tell her that her husband had died in a crash.
item.content:encoded: Concern grew when he stopped answering calls before police arrived at the family's home later that night to tell her that her husband had died in a crash.

item.title: US Iran War Live Updates: Marco Rubio Says US-Iran Peace Deal Still Possible By Today
item.description: US Iran War Live Updates: Iran's top negotiator Mohammad Baqer Qalibaf said Iran's armed forces had rebuilt their capabilities during the ceasefire.
item.content:encoded: US Iran War Live Updates: Iran's top negotiator Mohammad Baqer Qalibaf said Iran's armed forces had rebuilt their capabilities during the ceasefire.

item.title: Jet2 Pilot Suffers "Heart Attack" At 30,000 Ft, Plane Makes Emergency Landing In Portugal

media:content.media:description: The plane was flying from Tenerife to Birmingham.

item.description: Jet2 said safety was never compromised, and it also apologised for the disruption.
item.content:encoded: Jet2 said safety was never compromised, and it also apologised for the disruption.

item.title: Marco Rubio India Visit Live Updates: Rubio, Wife Visit Taj Mahal In Agra

media:content.media:description: Marco Rubio India visit: This is Marco Rubio's first trip to India since taking office

item.description: Marco Rubio India Visit Live Updates: The top US diplomat is scheduled to hold talks with External Affairs Minister S Jaishankar and attend a meeting of the Quad foreign ministers.
item.content:encoded: Marco Rubio India Visit Live Updates: The top US diplomat is scheduled to hold talks with External Affairs Minister S Jaishankar and attend a meeting of the Quad foreign ministers.

item.title: "May Agree To Later Nuke Talks If...": US' Olive Branch Amid Iran Standoff

media:content.media:description: Trump had earlier posted that the deal "has been largely negotiated"

item.description: Trump insisted the US blockade on Iranian shipping near the Strait of Hormuz would remain in place until an agreement "is reached, certified, and signed".
item.content:encoded: Trump insisted the US blockade on Iranian shipping near the Strait of Hormuz would remain in place until an agreement "is reached, certified, and signed".

item.title: London Dreams: Indian-Origin Mother-Son Duo Elected As Mayors In UK

media:content.media:description: 23-year-old Tushar Kumar and his mother Parveen Rani have been elected as mayors.

item.description: A mother and son from Haryana make history as they are both elected mayors in the UK.
item.content:encoded: A mother and son from Haryana make history as they are both elected mayors in the UK.

item.title: Plane Hits Paraglider Mid-Air, Tears Through Canopy In Shocking Video

media:content.media:description: Both the woman and the pilot escaped serious injury.

item.description: After landing at Zell am See Airport, the 28-year-old pilot also told the authorities that he was unable to avoid the collision.
item.content:encoded: After landing at Zell am See Airport, the 28-year-old pilot also told the authorities that he was unable to avoid the collision.

item.title: Trump Losing Iran War? Experts Say "Short-Term Romp Turning Into Failure"

media:content.media:description: Trump is now at risk of seeing the US and its Gulf Arab allies emerge from the conflict worse off

item.description: Trump campaigned for a second term promising no unnecessary military interventions but has brought the US into an entanglement that could do lasting damage to his foreign policy record and credibility abroad.
item.content:encoded: Trump campaigned for a second term promising no unnecessary military interventions but has brought the US into an entanglement that could do lasting damage to his foreign policy record and credibility abroad.

item.title: Explainer: Despite Trump's Pressure, Cuba May Not Turn Out Like Venezuela

media:content.media:description: A person holds a picture of former Cuban president Raul Castro

item.description: Cuba has been a US antagonist for decades, since Fidel Castro's 1959 revolution. Trump is strongly supported by hardline Cuban-Americans in Florida, who have pushed for US-instigated regime change for decades.
item.content:encoded: Cuba has been a US antagonist for decades, since Fidel Castro's 1959 revolution. Trump is strongly supported by hardline Cuban-Americans in Florida, who have pushed for US-instigated regime change for decades.

item.title: "Anything India Wants, They Get": Trump's Phone Call At Live Delhi Event

media:content.media:description: The event was in Delhi where Donald Trump dialled and sent wishes

item.description: Trump Dials Rubio During Live Delhi Event, Says, "I love Prime Minister Modi"
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1103774/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>Trump Dials Rubio During Live Delhi Event, Says, "I love Prime Minister Modi"

item.title: "Agreement With Iran Must Eliminate Nuclear Danger": Netanyahu To Trump

media:content.media:description: Netanyahu said Israel has the right to defend itself in every front. (File)

item.description: Netanyahu was referring to a conversation between the two leaders on Saturday night, which Trump had earlier said "went very well".
item.content:encoded: Netanyahu was referring to a conversation between the two leaders on Saturday night, which Trump had earlier said "went very well".

item.title: China Launches 3-Crew Space Flight As Part Of Moon Ambitions

media:content.media:description: A key experiment of Shenzhou-23 will be the full-year stay in orbit by one of the crew.

item.description: The Long March 2-F rocket blasted off in a cloud of flames and smoke on time at 11:08 pm (1508 GMT) from the Jiuquan launch centre in China's northwestern Gobi Desert.
item.content:encoded: The Long March 2-F rocket blasted off in a cloud of flames and smoke on time at 11:08 pm (1508 GMT) from the Jiuquan launch centre in China's northwestern Gobi Desert.

item.title: Marco Rubio's Pre-Birthday Celebration With Cake In Delhi Ft. Village People

media:content.media:description: Marco Rubio took part in his pre-birthday celebrations in New Delhi.

item.description: Rubio, who turns 55 on May 28, was invited on stage by US Ambassador to India Sergio Gor to take part in the celebrations.
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1103795/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>Rubio, who turns 55 on May 28, was invited on stage by US Ambassador to India Sergio Gor to take part in the celebrations.
